content:
💡 donutbrowser | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing multiple, isolated browser environments for tasks requiring distinct digital footprints, such as web scraping, testing, or maintaining anonymity online.
✨ Key Features: • Unlimited isolated browser profiles • Chromium & Firefox engines with advanced fingerprint spoofing • Proxy and VPN support per profile • Local API & MCP for automation
📖 Summary: Donut Browser is an open-source anti-detect browser built with Rust, offering robust privacy and profile management. It allows users to create and manage unlimited isolated browser profiles, each with its own unique fingerprint, cookies, and extensions, powered by Chromium and Firefox engines with advanced spoofing capabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
